response.justification: Bogdan has genuine high-throughput distributed systems experience (millions of HTTP req/sec at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic) and current hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, which maps well to the AI-native environment. However, Python — a stated must-have — is entirely absent from the resume and skills list, which is a material gap. Cross-functional stakeholder management and technical strategy ownership are not explicitly evidenced; the career reads as a strong senior IC rather than someone who has driven domain-level strategy. Worth a screening call to validate Python exposure and probe the depth of the re:cinq staff-level responsibilities before committing to a full loop.
strengths: Direct experience building low-latency, high-throughput micro-services handling millions of HTTP requests per second (Dunnhumby)
Current hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly matching the AI-native engineering baseline
Demonstrated breadth across distributed systems, embedded, mobile, and full-stack — strong signal of systems-level thinking
concerns: Python is completely absent from the resume and skills list, despite being a must-have technical requirement
Limited evidence of cross-functional stakeholder management or driving technical strategy across engineering, product, and leadership
Current Staff Engineer role at re:cinq started April 2025 (2 months tenure), making it difficult to assess actual scope and impact at that level
